title: rubus × propinquoides
intro: Rubus × propinquoides, also known as the hybrid raspberry or wild raspberry, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubus genus of bramble fruits. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins, ellagic acid, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rubus × propinquoides include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to protect against chronic diseases such as heart disease and certain types of cancer. Rubus × propinquoides can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
